title: Sassia violacea
taxonomy: Sassia violacea belongs to the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, which are marine snails. Within the class Gastropoda, Sassia violacea is further classified as an abalone, specifically belonging to the family Haliotidae. The family Haliotidae is a group of large sea snails that are primarily found in temperate and subtropical waters. Sassia violacea is a species of abalone that is native to the coastal waters of South Africa. This species is characterized by its distinctive purple shell coloration and is an important part of the marine ecosystem in its native range.
